text.title: Compliance Matrix — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `ComplianceMatrix` output covering 7 rows × 3 jurisdictions with binding evaluation and first-actions.

list.item: `generated_at` — ISO-8601
`operator` — object {entity_name, primary_jurisdiction, processes_data_from: array of jurisdictions}
`source_data_effective_date` — ISO-8601 (must be within 18 months)
`rows` — array of EXACTLY 7 `RowObligation` objects in fixed order
`disclaimer` — literal "NOT LEGAL ADVICE — structured starting point for counsel review."
`bound_rows_count` — integer (rows where any jurisdiction threshold passes)
`recommended_legal_engagement` — boolean (true if `bound_rows_count > 3`)
`row_id` — enum {entity_registration, data_basis, dpa, cookie_consent, marketing_email, ai_act, sales_tax_vat}
`jurisdictions` — object {us, uk, eu} each `{obligation, threshold, threshold_met: bool, statute_reference, effective_date}`
`first_action` — object `{action, owner_role, artifact, deadline_hint}` (NULL if no jurisdiction binds)
`requires_legal_review` — literal `true`
`notes` — string (≤ 240 chars)

antipattern.reason: Violates r2. Disclaimer is required to limit operator + distributor exposure.
Violates r2. Methodology never asserts a final compliance position.

antipattern.description: `first_action` text starts with "consult counsel" without an artifact or owner.
`rows.length != 7` OR rows not in canonical order.

list.item: Add a 4th column for additional jurisdictions (e.g. Canada PIPEDA) as an extension, not a replacement of the 3 core jurisdictions.
Aggregate state-level US statutes into the US column with footnotes.
Provide a markdown table representation alongside JSON.
Disclaimer present and literal.
7 rows in fixed order.
Each row has `requires_legal_review: true`.
Source data effective date within 18 months.
Bound rows have concrete first_action with artifact + owner.
